◎BrainOrchestrating

The bottleneck

Capability is proven. Paying customers are not.

You can build landing pages and agents in a weekend — but you still lose contracts without verifiable trust, clear offers, and documented outcomes. Distribution and sales are the gap. SourceA ships acquisition systems with proof attached so prospects can say yes faster.

What SourceA is

Business acquisition systems — not websites or chatbots.

SourceA turns ideas into proof-backed business acquisition engines. Factory, Runtime, and Proof layers enable deterministic execution and verifiable outcomes — far more than a site or an agent wrapper. One focused brand outward; build, operate, and prove inward.

Prompt→ Offer→ Assets→ Proofs→ Leads→ Contracts→ Retention

Customers care about: more contracts · verifiable trust · faster delivery · better retention. See the 48-hour offer →

Category reference

Why buyers name SourceA before anyone else.

SourceA owns fleet visibility. SourceA owns agent risk. SourceA owns the row nobody else completes — controlled build, live proof, and revenue outcomes in one delivery motion.

01

Only full proof row

Build · policy · receipt · replay · DFY delivery · weekly export — every competitor misses at least two. SourceA is the only checkmark across the matrix.

Compare matrix →
02

Proof closes in one sitting

ALLOW, BLOCK, tamper-FAIL — screen-shared live. Your client sees governance answer in real time. That is the demo that wins deposits.

<5 min · no deck

“We did not need another orchestrator. We needed proof in the repository before the board asked what ran at 2am. SourceA showed ALLOW, BLOCK, and tamper in one sitting — that was the reference demo.”

Central intelligence Live demo

One command center. Six specialists. Your business on autopilot — controlled.

This is what prospects see on your discovery call: a specialist team running outreach, proof, delivery, and expansion — every move logged every run. Not slides. A live console.

Agentic growth system

Governance is the engine. Revenue is the outcome.

Proof is not paperwork — it is how agencies and platform teams close $3–10K builds in weeks. Outreach books demos. Demos screen-share receipts. Builds become retainers. Every step controlled, every step counted.

Your team at work

Watch your agentic council run the business — before anything writes.

Turn 01 · LIVE

2:14am — the orchestrator wakes the council. Your policy speaks before your models do.

What you'll verify

One chain. Six beats. Five minutes.

Skip the deck. Walk from request to receipt to replay — verifiable on your screen in under five minutes.

Step through the live demo →

request→ policy→ decision→ receipt→ replay→ tamper-FAIL
01

Brief

Scope the job and lock your rules.

02

Dispatch

Policy checked before any agent acts.

03

Run

Specialists execute under the gate.

04

Gate

The gate refuses a bad move — BLOCK.

05

Receipt

Signed evidence written to disk.

06

Replay

Client audits the whole run on site.

ALLOW◆ BLOCK◆ tamper-FAIL
01

Something proposes action

Outreach, ops, research — your loop asks to run. The request enters the controlled path.

scoped request → role check
02

Your rules load first

Policy logged, scope check, feasibility — checked before any model token spends.

rules check → PASS
03

Dispatch gate fires

Not "we talked about governance at kickoff." This action, this moment, this verdict.

04

Verdict lands logged

ALLOW or BLOCK — recorded where replay can find it tomorrow morning.

PASS · BLOCK · tamper-FAIL
05

The loop runs — or stops

Blocked actions never touch production. Approved ones execute under monitor.

06

You export proof

Weekly bundle for your client: HTML, PDF, replay script, handoff note.

export → replay → handoff
replay · sourcea-boot

Last factory boot · 2026-06-24 03:23:04 UTC · PASS

$ sourcea-boot --json
SOURCEA_BOOT PASS ok=true
  [PASS] policy_version: no policy file (POLICY.md) (not configured)
  [PASS] provider: provider env present (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
  [PASS] receipt_fresh: no prior receipt — first boot allowed
  [PASS] queue_truth: no queue files configured (not configured)
REPORT=/Users/sinakazemnezhad/Desktop/SourceA/BOOT_REPORT.json▋

Capability map (illustrative)

Others sell a piece. You need the whole proof.

Builders wire workflows. Orchestrators move tasks. Slides promise governance. You need build, policy, receipt, replay, delivery, and weekly proof — in one row.

ApproachBuildPolicyReceiptReplayDFYWeekly proof

SourceA — reference standard

Illustrative capability map — not a competitive audit. See full compare for methodology footnote.

Your stack underneath. Signed receipts on top.

Cursor WorkerTemporalLangGraphn8nsourcea-bootGitHub evalWeekly PDFSelf-hosted
◇Start in shadowWatch policy fire without touching production — prove value before you enforce.
◇Evidence, not chatReceipts live on your disk — not in a thread someone can misremember.
◇Fail closedWhen policy says BLOCK, the loop stops. Altered receipts surface as tamper-FAIL.
◇Yours to keepSelf-hosted policy law — replay without renting your audit trail from a vendor.

What it costs

Fixed outcomes. No surprise hours.

You buy a scoped loop and the proof that ships with it — not a retainer that invoices for "alignment sessions."

Compare plans and terms →

Ops Health Audit

$750 one-time

  • 48-hour spine review
  • Board-ready PDF report
  • Clear path to a full build
Book audit
Most teams start here

Agent Loop Build

$3–10K project

  • One scoped loop live in 2–3 weeks
  • Handoff doc + live replay demo
  • 30-day fix window included

50% to start · balance when your loop passes logged

Start build

Retainer

$2–5K / month

  • Weekly proof export your stakeholders can verify
  • Changes gated by your approval
  • Controlled ops monitor on the loop (retainer target)
